panels.title: CVC Bandwidth — ${poi}
panels.description: Download, upload, and provisioned CVC capacity

targets.query:
from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "download")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Download")

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "upload")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Upload")

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "capacity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Capacity")

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "download")

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "download")

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "capacity")
  |> last()

panels.title: Peak Utilisation
panels.description: Peak download as percentage of CVC capacity

targets.query:
download = from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "download")
  |> max()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

capacity = from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "capacity")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.poi == "${poi}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "capacity")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: download._value / capacity._value * 100.0}))

panels.title: CVC Utilisation %
panels.description: Download bandwidth as percentage of provisioned capacity

targets.query:
download = from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc" and r.poi == "${poi}" and r.metric == "download")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

capacity = from(bucket: "abb-cvc")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc" and r.poi == "${poi}" and r.metric == "capacity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {download: download, capacity: capacity}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value_download / r._value_capacity * 100.0}))
  |> yield(name: "Utilisation")

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "abb-cvc", tag: "poi", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc", start: -30d)
list.name: poi
list.label: POI
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "abb-cvc", tag: "poi", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "abb_cvc", start: -30d)
